name: ItemExpiry
query:
SELECT I.barcode, POI.item_code as 'Item:Link/Item:200', POI.lot_no, POI.exp, '' as 'Is Sold Out', '' as 'Remaining Stock'
FROM `tabPurchase Order` PO 
JOIN  `tabPurchase Order Item` POI ON PO.name = POI.parent
JOIN `tabItem` I on I.item_code = POI.item_code
WHERE PO.status = 'completed'
AND POI.exp is not null
AND POI.exp between %(from_date)s and %(to_date)s
GROUP BY POI.item_code, POI.exp
ORDER BY POI.exp
